description: Style Note This stylish watch from titan, with classic, timeless styling is a must have for every well dressed man. Built with the utmost precision and individuality, each watch has been designed and carefully tested to give you years of reliable service and contemporary style for the man of class! Product Details Gold coloured steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfort Gold steel strap with a butterfly clasp White dial with gold hands Titan logo at the 12 hour mark Date apperture at the 3 hour mark Screw to reset time Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering or in light rain Size Case diameter: 25.4 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Warranty: 2 Years
